Expense Markup Rules

Rule Name Expense Type Value Vendors Properties Actions

No Markup Rules Found

Click the "Create New Rule" button to get started.

New Expense Markup Rule

Follow the steps to create a new markup rule.

1

Details

Rule name and value.

2

Vendors

Apply to vendors.

3

Properties

Apply to properties.

4

Review

Confirm and save.

Rule name is required.

At least one expense must be selected.

%

Percentage value is required.

$

Amount is required.

Select Vendors

Select the vendors this markup rule should apply to. If none are selected, the rule will apply to all vendors.

Apply to Properties

Select the properties this rule should apply to. If none are selected, the rule will apply to all properties.

Review Expense Markup Rule
